all.en: This morning I tried to log into my email but the password was rejected.
all.zh: 今天早上我試著登入電子信箱，但密碼卻被拒絕了。

all.en: I tried three more times before the system locked my account completely.
all.zh: 我又試了三次，系統就把我的帳號完全鎖住了。

all.en: A warning message told me to contact customer support right away.
all.zh: 一則警告訊息要我立刻聯絡客服。

all.en: I clicked the help link and was placed in a long online queue.
all.zh: 我點擊求助連結，被排進一個漫長的線上等候隊伍。

all.en: After forty minutes, a friendly agent named Lisa finally answered.
all.zh: 四十分鐘後，一位名叫麗莎的友善客服終於接通了。

all.en: She asked me several security questions to verify my identity.
all.zh: 她問了我幾個安全問題以確認我的身分。

all.en: Unfortunately, I could not remember my old recovery phone number.
all.zh: 很遺憾，我想不起我舊的救援電話號碼。

all.en: She suggested I upload a photo of my ID card for further checks.
all.zh: 她建議我上傳身分證照片以便進一步驗證。

all.en: Twenty minutes later, my account was finally restored.
all.zh: 二十分鐘後，我的帳號終於恢復了。

all.en: Lisa kindly reminded me to set up two-factor authentication.
all.zh: 麗莎親切地提醒我要設定雙重驗證。

all.en: I thanked her and promised to write down my passwords from now on.
all.zh: 我向她道謝，並承諾從今以後會把密碼記下來。
